data.title: Santiment reports surge in silver and gold buzz on social media. Silver reaches record high at $117, experts caution on a possible price peak.
data.description: The price of silver has been increasing steadily and reached a record high of over $117 on Tuesday. However, some experts caution that this peak might indicate a potential downturn in the near future for the valuable metal.

data.title: ERC-8004 could launch on Ethereum mainnet Thursday, allowing AI agents to connect trustlessly across platforms.
data.description: The ERC-8004 protocol, set to be launched on the mainnet this week by a leading developer, allows AI agents to identify and rely on one another across various platforms without the need for centralized intermediaries.

data.title: Steak ‘n Shake boosts reserve with $5M Bitcoin as in-store sales surge by 18%, outperforming rivals.
data.description: The restaurant chain credited its success in outperforming its fast-food rivals to the adoption of Bitcoin as a key factor.

data.title: Around 40% of US retailers now accept crypto payments, with hospitality, travel, digital goods, and gaming leading the way. Millennials and Gen Z leading the charge in crypto adoption.
data.description: The adoption of cryptocurrency has seen significant growth, especially within the hospitality, travel, digital goods, and gaming sectors. Millennials and Generation Z individuals are leading the way as the most knowledgeable and active users of crypto, with adoption rates steadily increasing in these demographics. The use of digital currencies is particularly pronounced in these industries, appealing to a younger demographic of consumers who are more comfortable and familiar with this form of payment. The trend reflects a broader shift towards digital transactions and the integration of blockchain technology in various sectors.

data.title: Another blow to NFT space as Rodeo shuts down, becoming 2nd platform this week after Nifty Gateway; launched on iOS in March.
data.description: On Saturday, the popular NFT marketplace Nifty Gateway made the decision to cease operations. Following suit, Rodeo, a platform that debuted exclusively on iOS just last March, has also announced its closure. This comes as a surprise to many in the digital collectibles community as both platforms were gaining traction. The shutdowns have left numerous users in dismay, with Nifty Gateway boasting a user base of over 500,000 and Rodeo making its mark in a short time frame since launching.

data.title: Canoe EIT Income Fund issues $300M in preferred units.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 5.6% in 2021, representing a significant increase from the previous year. The rebound in economic activity is attributed to various factors, including the rollout of COVID-19 vaccines and government stimulus packages. Advanced economies are projected to expand by around 5.8%, while emerging markets and developing economies are predicted to grow by approximately 6.3%. However, there are concerns about uneven recovery across countries and the persistence of the pandemic's impact on certain sectors. Inflation rates are also anticipated to rise, with consumer prices expected to increase by approximately 3.3% globally. These developments highlight the challenges and complexities facing the global economy as it strives to recover from the effects of the pandemic.

data.title: StandardAero priced secondary offering of 50M shares at $31/share by Carlyle Group Inc. and GIC affiliates.
data.description: StandardAero, Inc. disclosed the pricing details for its underwritten public offering where two stockholders, The Carlyle Group Inc. and GIC, intend to sell a total of 50,000,000 shares of the Company's common stock at $31.00 per share. The stock offering is valued at $1,550,000,000 in total. The Selling Stockholders will retain all net proceeds generated from the sales.

data.title: Canada Carbon finishes third drilling campaign on Asbury Graphite Property in Quebec, covering NE and SW areas.
data.description: In Toronto, Ontario, Canada, on January 27, 2026, Canada Carbon Inc. disclosed the successful completion of their third drilling campaign at the Asbury Graphite Property in Quebec. This campaign targeted the Northeast and Southwest sections of the property near Notre-Dame-du-Laus. Canada Carbon, listed as CCB on the TSX-V and U7N1 on the FF, expressed satisfaction with the drilling progress.
Aluminium surges 5%+ on SHFE’s most active contract.

data.title: Melania Trump to ring NYSE opening bell for Amazon documentary debut as her meme coin surges 42%.
data.description: Melania Trump, the First Lady, is set to ring the opening bell at the New York Stock Exchange to mark the upcoming release of her documentary. Titled "MELANIA" by Amazon MGM Studios, the film will premiere at the Kennedy Center on Jan. 30 and later be available on Amazon Prime Video. The documentary focuses on Melania's life as First Lady and her bond with President Donald Trump. Trump himself endorsed the film on Monday, hailing it as a "Must Watch." Melania will ring the bell on Wednesday, January 28, in celebration of @AmazonMGMStudio's global theatrical release.

data.title: Runway Growth Finance priced $100M offering of 7.25% Notes due 2031, resulting in net proceeds of $97M approx.
data.description: Runway Growth Finance Corp. has announced a public offering of $100.0 million in notes due 2031, resulting in net proceeds of approximately $97.0 million after expenses. The Notes will mature on February 3, 2031, with the option for the company to redeem them starting from February 3, 2028. They will be issued in denominations of $25, bearing interest at a rate of 7.25% per year, payable quarterly. The first interest payment is scheduled for March 1, 2026. The underwriters have been granted a 30-day option to purchase an additional $15.0 million of Notes to cover overallotments.

data.title: Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, Inc. expresses support for social justice & equality, highlighting issues faced by Black & Brown communities.
data.description: Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, Incorporated has expressed strong support for social justice, equity, and fair policy implementation, particularly for Black and Brown communities who frequently face the negative impacts of discriminatory systems. This stance was emphasized on January 27, 2026, in Washington.

data.title: Kilroy Realty Corp (NYSE: KRC) disclosed 2025 tax treatment for dividend distributions per share of common stock.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Kilroy Realty Corporation (NYSE: KRC) revealed the tax treatment for its dividend distributions in 2025. Regarding its common stock (CUSIP #49427F108), the company's total dividend distributions per share will be categorized as follows for income tax purposes: Total Distribution per Share: TBA, Total Distribution Attributable to 2025: TBA, 2025 Taxable Ordinary Dividend: TBA, 2025 Total Qualified Dividend: TBA, 2025 Total Capital Gain Distribution: TBA.

data.title: Edgecore Networks and Indio Networks integrate OpenWiFi for MSPs; provides validated solution for Telco deployments.
data.description: In Taiwan, Edgecore Networks, known for providing network solutions, and Indio Networks have revealed the successful implementation of a production-ready OpenWiFi integration. The collaboration aims to offer a reliable solution tailored for commercial MSP and Telco deployments. The joint effort features Edgecore access points utilizing OpenWiFi, and switches powered by OpenLAN Switching (OLS), alongside Indio Cl. This partnership signifies a milestone in the industry, promising enhanced connectivity for enterprises and telecommunication service providers.
